meta.title: Hidden Village Manager — FM24 / FHM-style UI Conversion Spec
conventions: Left primary nav (icon+label, collapsible to icons)
Persistent top bar with date, treasury, reputation, morale, and a central Continue button
Right-side context inspector that updates on row/entity selection
Every entity (shinobi, squad, village, mission) is a clickable hyperlink with hover preview and right-click context menu
Tables: sortable, reorderable, show/hide columns, saved views
Continue button reflects pending actions (color + badge + label)
meta.note: Six required keys present: goals, screens, components, flows, assets, roadmap. Accessibility/localization checklists, prompt snippets, and CSS tokens are nested under `assets` plus surfaced as top-level convenience keys (accessibility, localization, promptSnippets, cssTokens).

goals.title: Legibility over decoration — every screen answers 'what needs my decision now?'
goals.detail: Replace ambient stat tiles with FM24-style data density: one clear title, 3-5 primary KPIs, scannable sortable tables, and an inspector that explains the selected entity. The Continue button is the single source of 'what is blocking the turn'.
goals.successMetric: A returning player can identify and resolve all pending decisions in <30s from the Home screen.

goals.title: One interaction grammar everywhere — click, hover, right-click, Continue
goals.detail: Unify the current bespoke onclick handlers into a consistent grammar: left-click selects/opens, hover previews, right-click opens a context menu of verbs, and the spacebar/Continue advances. This makes 28 panels feel like one product.
goals.successMetric: Same gesture set works on shinobi, squads, villages, missions, prospects, and staff with zero per-screen relearning.

goals.title: Turn-based rhythm with reversible drilling — never lose the player's place
goals.detail: Mirror FM24's 'process the inbox, set instructions, Continue' loop. Decisions surface as inbox items or inspector actions; drilling into an entity is a non-destructive overlay/route that returns to context. Pending mid-mission events, exam stage postures, and war commands all route through the same decision queue.
goals.successMetric: Continue is disabled/annotated whenever an unresolved blocking decision exists; players never advance past a required choice by accident.

screens.name: Home (Hokage's Desk)
primaryTasks: Jump to the screen that needs action

informationHierarchy.title: Village name + Y{year} M{month} + prestige tier badge

screens.recommendedLayout: Left nav | top bar (KPIs + Continue) | center 2-col: left=Inbox digest (urgent first), right=Calendar + summary | right inspector hidden until an inbox item is selected

microcopy.empty_inbox: No decisions pending. The village runs smoothly.
microcopy.tooltip_morale: Village morale. Below 40 risks unrest and harder recruitment.

screens.name: Squad / Roster (Shinobi Force)

informationHierarchy.title: Shinobi Force — {n} shinobi ({available} available)
secondaryPanels: Selected shinobi inspector (stats, trajectory, dev path, contract)

screens.recommendedLayout: Left nav | tabs: Roster · Squads · Depth Chart · Development | center sortable table | right inspector = selected shinobi dossier

microcopy.col_grade_tip: Performance grade (S–F) from recent mission outcomes vs potential.
microcopy.devpath_set: Development path set: {path}. Biases monthly stat growth.
microcopy.trajectory_tip: Career arc: Ascending → Prime → Late Career → Declining (age vs peak).

screens.name: Missions (Operations Board)
screens.recommendedLayout: Left nav | tabs: Solo · Squad · Defense · Chains · Templates · Log · Underground | center mission cards (list/grid toggle) | right inspector = selected mission briefing (intel + candidate matchups)

microcopy.intel_tip: Mission intel: terrain, likely enemy clan, danger band, and the unit type that gets a bonus.

screens.name: Competitions (Chunin Exam / Nation War / Summit)
screens.recommendedLayout: Left nav | tabs: Chunin Exam · Nation War · Summit · S-Rank Bids · Records · Leaders | center bracket/standings | bottom action bar: posture/command + Run Stage

microcopy.posture_tip: Stage posture affects only your squads. Push = +advance, more wounds & fatigue.
microcopy.war_command_tip: Command order: Press (+advance, ×1.3 casualties) / Hold / Withdraw (−advance, ×0.55 casualties).

screens.name: Transfers & Scouting (Recruitment)
screens.recommendedLayout: Left nav | tabs: Transfer Market · Scouting · Academy · Youth | center prospect/market table | right inspector = prospect report or negotiation

microcopy.confidence_tip: Wider range = lower scout confidence. Invest scouting to narrow it.

screens.name: Finances & Economy (Treasury)
screens.recommendedLayout: Left nav | tabs: Overview · Trade · Contracts · Underground · History | center stream table + chart | right inspector = selected stream detail

microcopy.heat_tip: Underworld heat multiplies exposure risk and cools ~6/month if you lie low.
microcopy.cap_warn: Over payroll cap by {amount} ryo — cut salary or release.

screens.name: Village (Infrastructure & Doctrine)
screens.recommendedLayout: Left nav | tabs: Status · Upgrades · Clans · Tailed Beasts · Safehouses | center build/list | right inspector = selected building/clan/beast

microcopy.defense_tip: Defense rating reduces raid losses. Walls + seals + doctrine + active effects.

screens.name: Intelligence (Threat Board)
screens.recommendedLayout: Left nav | tabs: Threats · Dossiers · ANBU · Caught · Counter-Intel | center threat cards/table | right inspector = village dossier

microcopy.threat_tip: Threat tier blends relations and strength. CRITICAL = hostile + strong.

screens.name: History (Chronicles, Records, Memorial, Legacy)
screens.recommendedLayout: Left nav | tabs: Chronicle · Event Log · Records · Memorial · Legacy | center timeline | right inspector = entry detail

components.purpose: Sortable, reorderable, show/hide-column table with saved views — the workhorse for roster/market/intel.
Central turn-advance control that reflects pending blocking actions.

states.name: pending
states.label: {n} decision(s) pending
states.behavior: Clicking jumps to first unresolved decision instead of advancing

states.name: blocked
states.label: Resolve {n} to continue
states.tooltip: A required field decision / nomination is unresolved

components.purpose: Decision + message queue; the spine of the turn loop. Items are typed (complication, rival_bid, trade_offer, award, press, etc.).

item.title: Ambush — Rogue nin exploit winter cover
item.body: Enemy reinforcements cut off the route out.

components.purpose: Right-side panel that renders the selected entity (shinobi/squad/village/prospect) with verbs.
Right-click verb menu, consistent across all entities.
Focused task overlays (assign, negotiate, create squad, round results). Trap focus; Esc closes non-blocking.
Annual calendar / season timeline with event markers (Exam, Summit, War, Intake, loan expiries).
Tournament bracket for Chunin Exam / Nation War with per-stage advancement.
Line (finance history, morale trend), bar (income streams), radar (shinobi stats).
Mission-spec vs squad-fit matrix; clan-synergy grid; rival threat matrix.
Per-shinobi monthly activity (mission/train/rest/injured) like a contribution grid; surfaces fatigue/overuse.
Compact value renderers reused in tables and inspector.

steps.ui: Village name/kage/icon inputs + Founding Scenario segmented cards + nation pick
Continue & Begin button (ready)
Home screen, off-season banner (M1–M3), calendar populated
Inbox: contract renewals, recruitment; Continue shows pending count
DataTable sorted by ability; clan synergy header
Right inspector loads dossier (stats, trajectory, dev path)
SegmentedControl in inspector
Squads tab → create overlay (leader + 2)
Depth tab → drag to slots / Call Up

flows.name: Simulate Match (Mission / Exam Stage / War Round)

steps.ui: Set prep posture + per-stage posture/command; nominate squads
Continue ▸ (or Run Stage ▸)
Inbox decision (complication) blocks nothing but affects outcome
ModalDialog round overlay / mission report card with quality band + margin
Recruitment → Transfer Market DataTable
Inspector = player report + value estimate
Negotiation modal: fee, wage, clauses sliders
Inbox: counter or rival_bid; match or walk
confirmTransfer modal → roster updates
Budget split sliders + region assignments
Assign scout to region/prospect
Prospect rows show narrowing confidence ranges over months
Add to watchlist; later open negotiation
Roster → Development tab + Youth Academy
Per-student track + intensity + sensei selects
Per-shinobi training focus or rest month in dossier
Inbox training reports; milestone events (First S-Rank)

fonts: Segoe UI / system-ui for prose + nav
Courier New (mono) for numeric readouts: ryo, stats, dates

cssTokens.nationAccentOverride: JS sets --accent + derived vars from the active nation crest color

accessibility: All color-coded states also carry a text/icon cue (colorblind toggle already exists: _a11yColorblind → pattern tags)
Keyboard: full nav with 1–9 + letter shortcuts; visible focus ring (2px var(--accent)); Continue on Space/Enter
Right-click menus mirrored to a keyboard 'context' key + long-press for touch
Tables: header cells aria-sort; rows role=row; selected row aria-selected
Modals: focus trap, aria-modal, Esc to close (non-blocking), return focus to trigger
Min contrast WCAG AA (4.5:1 body, 3:1 large/UI) — verify --text on --surface and accent-on-dark
Min target size 24x24 logical for clickable chips; hover preview also reachable via focus
Respect prefers-reduced-motion (disable Continue spinner pulse, row transitions)
No information by color alone in charts/heatmaps — add labels + patterns
localization: Externalize all microcopy to a string table keyed by id (see screens[].microcopy)
Support ICU plurals/interpolation: '{n, plural, one {# decision} other {# decisions}}'
Keep IP-named entities (clans, villages, jutsu, beasts) in a separate namespace so a future IP-neutral build can swap them without touching UI strings
Date/number formatting via Intl; ryo uses Intl.NumberFormat
Layout: allow +30% text expansion (German/French) — nav labels and buttons must not truncate; tables reflow column min-widths
RTL-readiness: logical CSS props (margin-inline, inset-inline) where feasible
Avoid baking text into icons; tooltips localized

promptSnippets.matchReport: Write a 2-3 sentence {rank}-rank mission debrief. Inputs: mission={name}, squad={squad}, outcome={success|fail}, quality={decisive|narrow|costly|disaster}, standout={shinobi}, spec={spec}. Tone: terse field-report. No preamble. <=55 words.
promptSnippets.scoutingNote: 1-2 sentence scouting note on prospect {name}, age {age}, role {role}, potential band {lo}-{hi}, confidence {pct}%. Mention one strength + one risk. No names of real people. <=30 words.
promptSnippets.tooltip: One-line tooltip for UI element '{id}'. State what it is + the one decision-relevant consequence. <=14 words. No marketing tone.
promptSnippets.inboxEvent: Generate a mid-mission field event for spec={spec}. Output JSON {title,body(<=18 words),options:[{label(<=8 words),scMod,ryoMod,riskMod}]} with 2 options, opposite tradeoffs.
promptSnippets.efficiencyNote: All snippets: cap tokens, forbid preamble/markdown, require the field list back as compact text or JSON; cache the static instruction prefix and vary only the {inputs}.

items: App shell: left nav + top bar + content + inspector slots
ContinueButton with pending/blocked logic wired to inbox count
Right-click context menus per entity type
qa: Context menu verbs route to existing handlers

items: Home screen rebuild (KPIs + inbox digest + calendar)
qa: Resolving an item clears badge + advances gate
Continue blocked when nomination/field decision unresolved
Each flow in flows[] completes end-to-end
